case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. FARID GIBRAN GARCIA AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, FARID GIBRAN GARCIA $899.79 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,014.79, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOAN DELINQUENCY BY DEFENDANT. AWARD REVISED DOWNWARD PER PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNTING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,289.79 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, FARID GIBRAN GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED: FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED NOV-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, FARID GIBRAN GARCIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-24-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILLEF. CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (506)
